# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    apiVersion: 2018-11-01
    name: [functionAppName]
    location: [location]
    identity:
      type: SystemAssigned
    properties:
      serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', '[servicePlanName]')]"
      httpsOnly: true
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2018-09-01-preview
    name: "[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', [functionAppName]), 'StorageContributor')]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', [functionAppName]), '2018-11-01').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/ba92f5b4-2d11-4537-a479-3eab8838ca99')]" # Storage Contributor
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2018-09-01-preview
    name: "[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', [functionAppName]), 'KeyVaultContributor')]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', [functionAppName]), '2018-11-01').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/f7c8f4a7-e465-4e3e-b47d-cba205c96b8f')]" # Key Vault Contributor
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2018-09-01-preview
    name: "[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', [functionAppName]), 'SqlDbContributor')]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', [functionAppName]), '2018-11-01').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/9b7fafe4-a4b6-4c3f-bd7c-c5a229fb1c28')]" # SQL DB Contributor
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2018-09-01-preview
    name: "[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', [functionAppName]), 'CosmosDBContributor')]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', [functionAppName]), '2018-11-01').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/5ae67ddc-bccf-4eaf-a3b4-b5a92a542d7f')]" # Cosmos DB Contributor
